title: SICP full-book gate — 100% of the book plus beyond-book robustness
goal: Make 'Eshkol supports SICP' mean 100% of the entire book, not a representative subset. The release gate must fail until every manifest-required SICP section/example family is implemented as a runnable Eshkol probe under both JIT and AOT, and the suite must include beyond-book robustness stress for the same mechanisms.
next_actions: Keep the existing ch1-ch3, ch4 metacircular/amb, ch5 register-machine, and deep-CPS probes green under both -r and AOT.
Dispatch ESH-0038 for tests/sicp/ch2_picture_painters.esk (SICP 2.2.4 full picture language painters/combinators).
Dispatch ESH-0039 for tests/sicp/ch2_generic_tower_coercion.esk (SICP 2.5 generic tower/coercion).
Dispatch ESH-0040 for tests/sicp/ch2_polynomial_arithmetic.esk (SICP 2.5.3 polynomial arithmetic).
Dispatch ESH-0041 for tests/sicp/ch3_mutable_pairs_cycles.esk (SICP 3.3.1 mutable pairs/sharing/cycles).
Dispatch ESH-0035 for tests/sicp/ch3_digital_circuit.esk (SICP 3.3.4 digital-circuit simulator).
Dispatch ESH-0036 for tests/sicp/ch3_constraints.esk (SICP 3.3.5 constraint-propagation system).
Dispatch ESH-0037 for tests/sicp/ch3_concurrency.esk (SICP 3.4 concurrency, serializers, and account exchange).
Dispatch ESH-0042 through ESH-0045 for richer SICP 3.5 stream systems: acceleration/tableaux, power series, signal systems, and random Monte Carlo streams.
Dispatch ESH-0046 and ESH-0047 for SICP 4.1 analyzing evaluator and derived-form coverage.
Dispatch ESH-0029 for tests/sicp/ch4_lazy_evaluator.esk (SICP 4.2 normal-order/lazy evaluator).
Dispatch ESH-0048 and ESH-0049 for SICP 4.3 ambeval evaluator/driver and nondeterministic parser.
Dispatch ESH-0030 for tests/sicp/ch4_query_system.esk (SICP 4.4 query evaluator).
Dispatch ESH-0050 and ESH-0051 for SICP 5.1-5.2 stack operations/statistics and recursive register-machine programs.
Dispatch ESH-0031 for tests/sicp/ch5_storage_gc.esk (SICP 5.3 storage allocation and garbage-collector model).
Keep the ESH-0034 section/example coverage manifest current whenever new SICP probes land.
Extend beyond-book stress as blockers are fixed: deeper amb/query backtracking, larger evaluator programs, and AOT/JIT parity checks.
acceptance: SICP_COMPLETENESS_REPORT.md contains a section/example coverage manifest mapping every SICP section and example family to runnable evidence or a named still-open blocker.
Every SICP book system and manifest-required example family has a runnable tests/sicp/*.esk probe.
Every SICP probe passes under both -r and AOT.
.icc/completion-oracles.yaml::sicp-completeness requires and observes PASS events for the full-book systems.
The suite includes beyond-book robustness coverage for mechanisms stressed by SICP, starting with deep CPS/backtracking.
status_note: Current implemented corpus is green but incomplete. The full-book release gate is intentionally red until every manifest-required blocker has a runnable probe under both JIT and AOT, including the newly exposed ESH-0038 through ESH-0051 coverage gaps. Existing implemented subset remains regression coverage, not sufficient release evidence.
ux_payoff: Turns 'we can reproduce SICP in Eshkol' into a literal full-book property, then uses Eshkol's JIT/AOT and stress coverage to exceed the book examples.
